meta.title: Counsel by Camille — Business Strategy · v36 Kimberly
meta.description: Business strategy for women who already know their worth. Template concept.

sections.title:
Lead with clarity.
Move with intention.
sections.sub: Business strategy for women who already know their worth.

sections.head: Strategic support for women who lead — without losing themselves in the leading.

cells.d: Name the next right move — and release the seventeen others crowding it.
Build a business that reflects who you are now, not who you were at the start.
Move with intention: quarterly rhythm, honest metrics, sustainable pace.

sections.h: Why your best quarter ever didn't feel like it — and what we do about that.
sections.p: Placeholder bio: after a decade advising founders, Camille built a quieter kind of practice — strategy sessions that slow you down enough to see the whole board, then move once, deliberately.

rows.d: One deep session. The whole board, seen at once. A decision made.
A standing seat at your table — strategy, accountability, calm.
Self-paced clarity work for the season you're actually in.

lines: This work helped me slow down enough
to see what the business was trying to become —
and then it moved faster than ever.

cards.t: the quiet metrics that actually predict a good year
a ninety-minute quarterly review you'll keep doing
on saying no to good opportunities

sections.title: Clarify your next move — then make it.
